data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific private note, 'Difficult customer, be extra patient', which is not present in the linked use case evidence. The only notes mentioned are public and AI agent notes, with no evidence of the required private note. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not confirm the presence of the necessary private note.
gaps: Private note 'Difficult customer, be extra patient' is not present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
